refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation communication quality such that packet loss does not exceed the customer-defined limit under agreed network conditions.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR clarifies the performance metric (packet loss) and ties it explicitly to customer-defined limits and network conditions, ensuring measurable and testable requirements.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure packet loss percentage during teleoperation sessions under controlled network conditions and verify it remains within the customer-defined limit.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report packet loss status to relevant system components.

candidate_dps: Implement adaptive communication protocol with error correction and retransmission.
Use redundant network links to reduce effective packet loss.
Prioritize teleoperation data packets in network traffic.
selected_dp.selected_dp: Implement adaptive communication protocol with error correction and retransmission.

coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically isolates communication quality management within the teleoperation communication stack, minimizing coupling with other system functions.

assumptions_risks: Assumes network conditions are within agreed parameters.
Risk that adaptive protocol complexity may introduce latency affecting teleoperation responsiveness.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider adding latency constraints to the FR to balance packet loss and responsiveness.

im_boundary.name: Teleoperation
im_boundary.scope: Module responsible for teleoperation control, communication management, and related data processing.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Interface for sending and receiving teleoperation data packets over the network.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Interface to report communication quality metrics and status to the NGHE Solution module.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Interface to receive teleoperation commands from the NGHE Solution or Vehicle modules.

module_containment_scores.notes: Contains overall system coordination but less direct control over communication protocols.
Primarily physical control; communication protocol logic is less contained here.
Highest containment score as communication protocol logic and packet loss management are core responsibilities.
Focuses on safety alerts, not communication quality management.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Assigning the DP to the Teleoperation module centralizes communication quality management, minimizing diffusion and enabling focused ownership.
containment_risks: Potential overlap with NGHE Solution for telemetry reporting may cause interface complexity.
If adaptive protocol requires hardware support, coordination with Vehicle module needed.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Clarify interface responsibilities between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution to reduce overlap.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP directly addresses the refined FR by implementing adaptive communication protocols to meet packet loss limits.

diffusion_risks: Telemetry reporting overlaps with NGHE Solution module, requiring clear interface definitions.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Teleoperation module shows strong containment of DP with minimal diffusion, supporting clear ownership.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by monitoring packet loss metrics via Teleoperation module interfaces and validating against customer limits.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of communication quality management to Teleoperation module with defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Define explicit interface contracts between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution for telemetry data.
Consider latency constraints in FR to balance packet loss and responsiveness.

decision.justification: While the decomposition is sound, interface clarity and latency considerations require refinement before proceeding to next level.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report packet loss status to relevant system components.

revise.why: Add latency constraints and clarify interface responsibilities to ensure balanced performance and clear module boundaries.

assumptions: Network conditions remain within agreed parameters.
Adaptive communication protocol can be implemented within Teleoperation module.
open_risks: Latency impact of adaptive protocol on teleoperation responsiveness.
Interface complexity between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution modules.
evidence_needed: Latency measurements under adaptive protocol operation.
Interface specification documents between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution.
